untranslatable_reason: Horn Bottom pattern requires identification of two bottoms at similar price levels (dual-bottom structure) which cannot be precisely expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. Table 28.1 identification guidelines and exact target price computation (Table 28.2) are not provided. Conditions above represent best approximation using reversal indicators (price near lows, increased volume, upside breakout confirmation), but dual-bottom structure verification requires multi-bar pattern recognition beyond indicator scope.
